=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (9:14-9:27) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowBlockGen\")"

[D2] (16:14-16:32) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowExpressionGen\")"

[D3] (22:14-22:35) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionExpressionGen\")"

[D4] (29:17-29:39) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionDeclarationGen\")"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D1] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = Effect.fn(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D1] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowBlockGen\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = Effect.fn("arrowBlockGen")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = Effect.fn(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowExpressionGen\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = Effect.fn("arrowExpressionGen")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D3] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = Effect.fn(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D3] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionExpressionGen\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = Effect.fn("functionExpressionGen")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});

export function functionDeclarationGen(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationGen = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});


=== [D4] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationGen = Effect.fn(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});


=== [D4] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionDeclarationGen\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_basic.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases can be converted to Effect.fnUntraced because:
// - There are no pipe arguments
// - There is no withSpan for tracing
// Converting to Effect.fnUntraced improves performance by not
// reallocating the generator function on every call.

export const arrowBlockGen = (n: number) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const arrowExpressionGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })

export const functionExpressionGen = function(n: number) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    return n
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationGen = Effect.fn("functionDeclarationGen")(function* (n: number) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1);
    return n;
});
